background_check: Yes, but no credit score check; no prior employer contact
hiring_process: Online application (30-45 min), FaceTime interviews, background check, orientation online

hiring_process: Online application, typing test (85+ wpm recommended), phone interview, training week online

barrier_level: Medium - Has camera requirement; micromanaging culture

hiring_process: Online application, phone interview, background check, paid training
employee_sentiment: Job was easy but dull. Great team environment and employee appreciation programs.

hiring_process: Online application, phone interview, background check

hiring_process: Online application, interview, background check

employee_sentiment: Known to work with candidates with backgrounds if they're right fit

hiring_process: Online application, phone interview, background check
employee_sentiment: Prudential: 'Everyone can participate in opportunities we create'

hiring_process: Quick application, typing test, phone screen, training

barrier_level: Medium - Federal Public Trust background required

hiring_process: Online application, sample transcription, quick decision
employee_sentiment: Professional transcription service with competitive pay

hiring_process: Online application, sample transcription, acceptance within days

hiring_process: Online application, screener test, invitation to take tests

hiring_process: Register online, complete surveys, get paid

employee_sentiment: Great for flexible work but competitive. Start low, build reputation, raise rates.

hiring_process: Create gig, wait for buyers, deliver projects
employee_sentiment: Good for building passive income but requires initial hustle to get reviews.

hiring_process: Online application, subject verification, interview, background check
employee_sentiment: Good supplemental income if you have subject expertise.

barrier_level: Low - No degree required but slow start

employee_sentiment: Flexible hours and set own rates, but commission is crazy. Start at $6/hr.

hiring_process: Apply online, background check, approval
employee_sentiment: Great way to make extra cash. Good opportunity and easy acceptance.

hiring_process: Register, complete screener, get tests
employee_sentiment: Recommended over UserTesting due to satisfaction guarantee.

hiring_process: Online application, 'test task', acceptance same day usually
key_con: Pay is VERY low ($2.75 per task average)
employee_sentiment: Pay is terrible. Tasks supposed to be 15-20 min but take 30-45+ min for $2.75.

hiring_process: Register on Honest Jobs, browse 300k+ verified jobs, apply directly
key_con: Not a job itself, but job board
employee_sentiment: Honest Jobs is specifically for fair chance hiring. Very helpful resource.

key_con: Not direct employment; must apply to individual jobs
employee_sentiment: GEO Reentry Connect is helpful for reentry job search with support.

hiring_process: Search ZipRecruiter, use 'fair chance' filter, apply
employee_sentiment: ZipRecruiter fair chance filter is useful for finding employers.

hiring_process: Search 'fair chance' or 'second chance', apply
employee_sentiment: Indeed has many fair chance jobs available.

hiring_process: Subscribe, browse curated remote jobs, apply
